name: ai-news-bot
description: Aggregates AI news from X, Hacker News, Reddit, and RSS, then posts scored summaries to Discord.

scripts.docker:run-now: docker compose run --rm -e RUN_ONCE=true ai-news-bot npm start
scripts.docker:run-now:dry: docker compose run --rm -e RUN_ONCE=true -e DRY_RUN=true ai-news-bot npm start
scripts.pm2:start: npx pm2 start start.sh --name ai-news-bot --interpreter bash && npx pm2 save
scripts.pm2:kill: npx pm2 delete ai-news-bot && npx pm2 kill
